condition: doc.expected_delivery_date and doc.status not in ('Delivered', 'Cancelled') and frappe.utils.getdate(doc.expected_delivery_date) < frappe.utils.getdate(frappe.utils.today())
message:
Dear Team,

Freight Order {{ doc.name }} is delayed.

Customer: {{ doc.customer }}
Expected Delivery: {{ doc.expected_delivery_date }}
Current Status: {{ doc.status }}
Vehicle: {{ doc.vehicle }}
Driver: {{ doc.driver }}

Please take immediate action.
name: Shipment Delayed Alert
subject: Shipment Delayed: {{ doc.name }} for {{ doc.customer }}
